Platform Engineer
Beta GmbH — Berlin (Hybrid)

We are hiring a Platform Engineer to scale our Kubernetes infrastructure.

What you bring
- Strong experience with Kubernetes and Terraform
- Familiarity with Go or Rust
- Experience with observability stacks (Prometheus, Grafana)

Important
- You must reside in the EU or have valid EU work authorization.
  We do not sponsor visas for this role.
- This is a hybrid position based in Berlin (3 days/week in office).
